# `!wait_for_http`

**Category:** control

Poll an HTTP endpoint until it responds (optionally with a specific status code), useful for waiting on an API or service to become ready after boot. Fails on timeout.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | string | yes | The HTTP(S) URL to poll. |
| `expected` | int | no | Expected HTTP status code (e.g. 200). If omitted, any 2xx is accepted. |
| `timeout` | int | no | Maximum seconds to wait. Default 300. |
| `delay` | int | no | Seconds between polls. Default 5. |
| `verify_tls` | bool | no | Verify the TLS certificate. Default false. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !wait_for_http
  url: http://10.7.1.50:8080/health
  expected: 200
  timeout: 120
```
